dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6

learning_reels.container: flex flex-col items-center gap-8 py-8 h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-scroll snap-y snap-mandatory
learning_reels.card: w-full max-w-md h-[80vh] snap-center shrink-0 rounded-3xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative

community_feed.classes: columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3 gap-6 space-y-6 p-6

buttons.default: rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm

hero_section.alt: Woman meditating in nature, embodying calm
hero_section.usage: Landing page hero background or main visual

learning_section.usage: Background for learning module or abstract visual for focus

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPLEMENT THEME SWITCHER: Create a 'ThemeContext' that manages 'calm', 'dark', and 'vibrant' classes on the <html> or <body> tag. Update tailwind.config.js to handle these classes if necessary, or use CSS variables in index.css mapped to these classes.

USE SHADCN FOR INTERACTIVITY: Use Shadcn components for all complex interactions (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Forms). Customize their styling via Tailwind classes to match the 'rounded-2xl' and 'glassmorphism' aesthetic.

REELS INTERFACE: For the Learning Module, build a custom component that mimics TikTok/Reels. It must snap to center, have a 9:16 aspect ratio container, and use the 'learning_section' image as a placeholder background for video content.
DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Strictly follow the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. Do not just stack cards. Use col-span and row-span to create visual interest.
COMMUNITY SAFETY: In the 'Hope Notes' section, visually distinguish 'Moderator' or 'Safe' badges. Use soft colors for user posts, avoiding harsh borders.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards, especially in the 'Vibrant' theme. Use 'data-testid' on all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
